name: Fried Corn Cakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together the corn, egg, curry paste, rice flour, soy sauce, and salt.
2. Shape the mixture with your hands to form circular cakes about 1 inch in diameter.
3. Dip the cakes in the wheat flour and then fry immediately in very hot oil. Do not fry more than 6 to 8 cakes at a time or they will not cook properly.
-----SAUCE-----
To make the sauce, bring vinegar, water, sugar, salt, and chili to a boil. Let it cool.
1. Pound peanuts and add them to the cooled mixture.
2. Lastly, add cucumber slices.
-----YELLOW CURRY PASTE-----
1 tsp Cumin seeds
1 tsp Coriander seeds
8 dried chilies
1/2 tsp Ground cinnamon
1 tsp Salt
1/2 tsp Ground cloves
1 tbsp Chopped lemon grass
2 tbsp Chopped shallots
1 tbsp Chopped garlic
1 tbsp Yellow curry powder
